creator: TsurutaniNaoki@gmail.com
text:
building devel/libgee fails while japanese/sed is installed.
	"-E" option is not understood.

Fix: use "-r" instead of "-E".
	a patch for devel/libgee can be written.
	however, I think fixing japanese/sed is better.
	I do not know whether "-r" can be treated just as "-E",
	but sed/sed.c says "-r" is for extended regular expression.
	here is a patch which should be saved as japanese/sed/files/patch-sed_sed.c:
How-To-Repeat: 	always with japanese/sed installed.
